name: White Gold Corp.
description: White Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration company operating exclusively in the prolific White Gold District located south of Dawson City in northwest Yukon, Canada. The company's district-scale land package spans over 350,000 hectares, representing 40% of the district, and includes defined gold deposits and exciting exploration targets. In partnership with Agnico Eagle, the company is actively advancing its flagship White Gold Project, which hosts significant indicated and inferred gold resources, positioning it as a key player in the modern Yukon gold rush.
